clickhouse.current_behavior: Appends one row with identity key and payload_json.
clickhouse.future_mapping: package/artifact/element or chunk tables keyed by package_id and artifact_id

filesystem.current_behavior: Writes artifact directory rooted by sha256; does not emit DeliveryPayloadV1 externally.

kafka.current_behavior: Publishes DeliveryPayloadV1 JSON with key based on delivery identity.
kafka.future_mapping: key=package_id:artifact_id with package envelope or artifact event

loki.current_behavior: Pushes one payload JSON line with delivery labels.
loki.future_mapping: package event labels plus artifact event JSON log line

mongodb.current_behavior: Upserts one document keyed by delivery identity with nested payload.
mongodb.future_mapping: package and artifact documents keyed by package_id and artifact_id

opensearch.current_behavior: Indexes a document containing delivery_identity and nested payload.
opensearch.future_mapping: doc id = package_id:artifact_id or chunk id with package metadata

s3.current_behavior: Writes one DeliveryPayloadV1 JSON object keyed by idempotency key.
s3.future_mapping: prefix by package_id with manifest and artifact objects

sqlite.current_behavior: Upserts one row with payload_json keyed by delivery identity.
sqlite.future_mapping: package/artifact tables or compatibility wrapper over payload_json

weaviate.current_behavior: Indexes one object from result summary fields, not the full payload.
weaviate.future_mapping: chunk-level objects with package metadata and artifact lineage

webhook.current_behavior: POSTs DeliveryPayloadV1 to a single endpoint.
webhook.future_mapping: package envelope or artifact event webhook shape
